title: DOERNBECHER CHILDREN'S HOSPITAL - 211info
text: DOERNBECHER CHILDREN'S HOSPITAL DOERNBECHER CHILDREN'S HOSPITAL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a pediatric primary and specialty care to meet the needs of children and young adults. Primary services include neonatal and pediatric intensive care, cardiac surgery, organ and stem cell transplantation, and the treatment of cancer, heart disease, diabetes, kidney disease, metabolic disorders, and trauma. It is the major pediatric transplant center in Oregon, performing kidney, heart, cornea, and bone marrow transplants. 700 SW Campus Drive Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Ages 0-22 Hours: Regular hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Emergency: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (503) 346-0640 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 346-0640 Emergency Department (503) 494-7551 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to schedule an appointment. Walk in for emergency services. FEES: Accepts Medicaid, private insurance, and private pay. Financial assistance may be available through patient billing office. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located in Doernbecher Children's Hospital, lobby level Services: Hospitals Pediatrics Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - ADOLESCENT AND CHILD PSYCHIATRY PUBLIC SAFETY - TOM SARGENT SAFETY CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
